subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablih-Husayn! We have made mention of thee time and time again, and this is yet another occasion. Give thanks unto the Lord of all mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین قد ذکرناک مره بعد مره و هذه هی کره اخری ان اشکر مولی الوری
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
